title: GTOEX
description: GTOEX is a storage unit module extended for the (AE2) module, primarily providing two special storage units and world data management functionality, aimed at reducing unnecessary repetitive labor processes(MOD currently only has a Chinese translation)
body:
基本信息
--------
- 模组名称: GTOEX
- 版本号: 1.3.2-1.20.1
- 适用游戏版本: Minecraft 1.20.1
- 适用 Forge 版本: 47.4.13+
- 开发者: LIN
- 许可证: MIT
- 模组ID: gtoex
- 依赖模组: Applied Energistics 2 (AE2) 15.4.9+

功能描述
--------
GTOEX 是一个为 Applied Energistics 2 (AE2) 模组扩展的存储单元模组，主要提供了两种特殊的存储单元，以及世界数据管理功能，用于减少无意义的重复劳动环节：

1. 吞噬万籁之寂静
   - 核心功能: 能够无限存储物品或流体，但不具备无限取出功能
   - 存储特点: 显示真实存储数值，容量上限为30位小数的"bigger level"存储
   - 使用场景: 适合需要大量存储但不需要频繁取出的场景，如资源备份、长期存储
   - 操作特性: 存储物品或流体时显示真实数量，取出时按实际数量扣除

2. 无限共鸣之虚空
   - 核心功能: 支持四种工作模式，能够智能地将物品或流体标记为无限
   - 工作模式:
     - 1: 真无限模式 - 所有物品和流体都视为无限资源
     - 2: 输入无限模式 - 物品/流体一旦被输入立即变为无限
     - 3: 阈值无限模式 - 物品/流体达到预设阈值时自动变为无限
     - 4: 好东西无限模式 - 仅内置定义的"好东西"物品/流体视为无限(未完成)
   - 智能特性: 具有智能的无限状态判断机制，支持实时状态切换
   - 删除模式: 支持通过Shift+右键点击切换删除模式，删除模式下禁用存入功能

3. 世界数据管理系统
   - 核心功能: 提供世界数据验证、修复和强制保存功能
   - 命令系统: 新增 /gtoex worldfix 系列命令，用于管理世界数据
   - 备份功能: 优化的备份系统，支持后台执行和资源调度
   - 数据安全性: 多层次的保存机制，确保世界数据安全

安装说明
--------
1. 确保已安装 Minecraft 1.20.1 版本
2. 安装 Forge 47.4.13+ 版本
3. 安装 Applied Energistics 2 (AE2) 15.4.9+ 版本
4. 将 GTOEX-1.3.2-1.20.1.jar 文件放入游戏目录下的 mods 文件夹
5. 启动游戏，配置文件将自动生成在 config 文件夹下

配置文件说明
------------
配置文件位于游戏目录下的 config/gtoexconfig.toml，主要配置项包括：

1. 无限共鸣之虚空运行模式
   - 参数名称: goodStuff.mode
   - 数据类型: 整数
   - 取值范围: 1-4
   - 默认值: 3（阈值无限模式）
   - 功能描述: 设置好东西磁盘的运行模式
   - 模式说明:
     - 1: 真无限模式 - 所有物品和流体都视为无限资源
     - 2: 输入无限模式 - 物品/流体一旦被输入立即变为无限
     - 3: 阈值无限模式 - 物品/流体达到预设阈值时变为无限
     - 4: 好东西无限模式 - 仅内置定义的"好东西"物品/流体视为无限

2. 物品阈值
   - 参数名称: goodStuff.itemThreshold
   - 数据类型: 长整数
   - 取值范围: 1-9223372036854775807
   - 默认值: 100000
   - 功能描述: 设置物品达到无限状态的阈值
   - 说明: 流体阈值自动设置为物品阈值的1000倍
   - 适用模式: 仅在阈值无限模式下生效

3. 流体阈值（已弃用）
   - 参数名称: goodStuff.fluidThreshold
   - 数据类型: 长整数
   - 取值范围: 1-9223372036854775807
   - 默认值: 100000
   - 功能描述: 流体阈值（已弃用）
   - 说明: 此设置已弃用，流体阈值自动为物品阈值的1000倍
   - 适用模式: 仅在阈值无限模式下生效

4. 无限状态最大值
   - 参数名称: goodStuff.infiniteValue
   - 数据类型: 字符串（表示大整数）
   - 取值范围: 有效的 BigInteger 字符串
   - 默认值: "100000000000000000000000000000"（10^30）
   - 功能描述: 设置无限状态下显示的最大值
   - 使用注意事项:
     - 必须是有效的 BigInteger 字符串，只能包含数字
     - 过大的值可能导致显示问题
     - 无效值会自动使用默认值

5. 命令系统总开关
   - 参数名称: commands.enabled
   - 数据类型: 布尔值
   - 取值范围: true/false
   - 默认值: true
   - 功能描述: 控制是否启用所有 GTOEX 命令

6. /gtoex setup 命令配置
   - 参数名称: commands.setup.enabled
   - 数据类型: 布尔值
   - 取值范围: true/false
   - 默认值: true
   - 功能描述: 控制是否启用 /gtoex setup 命令

7. /gtoex setup 命令权限等级
   - 参数名称: commands.setup.permissionLevel
   - 数据类型: 整数
   - 取值范围: 0-2
   - 默认值: 1
   - 功能描述: 使用 /gtoex setup 命令所需的权限等级
   - 权限说明:
     - 0: 所有玩家都可以使用
     - 1: 游戏管理员可以使用
     - 2: 服务器管理员可以使用

8. /gtoex setup 命令冷却时间
   - 参数名称: commands.setup.cooldown
   - 数据类型: 整数
   - 取值范围: 0-3600
   - 默认值: 30
   - 功能描述: /gtoex setup 命令的冷却时间（秒）

9. /gtoex setup 命令最大距离
   - 参数名称: commands.setup.maxDistance
   - 数据类型: 整数
   - 取值范围: 1-100
   - 默认值: 5
   - 功能描述: /gtoex setup 命令允许的最大使用距离（方块）

10. /gtoex setup 命令支持生存模式
    - 参数名称: commands.setup.allowSurvival
    - 数据类型: 布尔值
    - 取值范围: true/false
    - 默认值: true
    - 功能描述: 是否允许在生存模式下使用 /gtoex setup 命令

11. 吞噬盘配置
    - 参数名称: voraciousDisk.dropChance
    - 数据类型: 浮点数
    - 取值范围: 0.0-100.0
    - 默认值: 1.0
    - 功能描述: 调整村民掉落吞噬盘的概率（%）

使用指南
--------

1. 吞噬万籁之寂静磁盘
   - 获取方式: 通过击杀村民随机掉落（默认掉落概率1.0%）
   - 使用方法: 放入AE2存储系统中使用
   - 功能特性: 
     - 能够无限存储物品或流体
     - 显示真实存储数值
     - 取出时按实际数量扣除，不支持无限取出
     - 容量上限为30位小数的"bigger level"存储
   - 适用场景: 适合需要大量存储但不需要频繁取出的场景，如资源备份、长期存储

2. 无限共鸣之虚空
   - 获取方式: 通过合成或管理员指令获得
   - 使用方法: 放入AE2存储系统中使用
   - 模式切换: 通过修改配置文件中的 goodStuff.mode 参数调整运行模式
   - 阈值无限模式: 
     - 物品达到100000时自动变为无限
     - 流体达到100000000时自动变为无限（物品阈值的1000倍）
     - 达到阈值后显示无限符号，允许无限取出
     - 未达到阈值时显示真实数值，取出时按实际数量扣除
   - 删除模式: 
     - 通过Shift+右键点击切换删除模式
     - 删除模式下禁用存入功能
     - 适合清理不需要的物品
   - 好东西无限模式: 
     - 仅内置定义的"好东西"物品/流体视为无限
     - 其他物品/流体按实际数量存储和取出

3. 命令使用

   /gtoex setup
   - 功能: 自动设置AE2网络组件
   - 权限等级: 1（游戏管理员）
   - 冷却时间: 30秒
   - 最大距离: 5方块
   - 支持生存模式: 是
   - 使用方法: 站在要设置AE2网络的位置，输入 /gtoex setup 命令

   /gtoex add
   - 功能: 将副手物品或流体容器内的流体添加到好东西盘，并标记为无限属性
   - 权限等级: 1（游戏管理员）
   - 使用条件: 主手持好东西盘，副手持物品或流体容器
   - 操作流程: 
     - 主手持好东西盘
     - 副手持物品或装有流体的容器
     - 输入 /gtoex add 命令
     - 流体容器会保留，只提取其中的流体
     - 为添加的物品/流体标记"无限"属性
   - 专属添加特性: 
     - 指令添加的无限物品在删除模式中实际数量为1
     - 指令添加的无限流体在删除模式中实际数量为1000
     - AE系统表面显示为"无限"

   /gtoex delete
   - 功能: 移除好东西盘中物品或流体的专属添加属性
   - 权限等级: 1（游戏管理员）
   - 使用条件: 主手持好东西盘，副手持物品或流体容器
   - 操作流程: 
     - 主手持好东西盘
     - 副手持物品或装有流体的容器
     - 输入 /gtoex delete 命令
     - 流体容器会保留，只操作其中的流体

   /gtoex worldfix
   - 功能: 执行完整的世界修复操作，包括验证、修复和保存
   - 权限等级: 2（服务器管理员）
   - 使用方法: 输入 /gtoex worldfix 命令
   - 执行流程: 
     - 验证世界数据完整性
     - 尝试修复损坏的区块
     - 强制保存世界数据

   /gtoex worldfix validate
   - 功能: 仅验证世界数据完整性，不执行修复操作
   - 权限等级: 2（服务器管理员）
   - 使用方法: 输入 /gtoex worldfix validate 命令

   /gtoex worldfix save
   - 功能: 仅执行强制世界保存操作
   - 权限等级: 2（服务器管理员）
   - 使用方法: 输入 /gtoex worldfix save 命令

   /gtoex fix world
   - 功能: 与 /gtoex worldfix 相同，为兼容旧命令路径
   - 权限等级: 2（服务器管理员）

4. 配置管理
   - 配置文件: config/gtoexconfig.toml
   - 配置界面: 在游戏内模组列表中找到GTOEX，点击"配置"按钮
   - 保存配置: 修改配置后点击"保存配置"按钮
   - 加载配置: 点击"加载保持的配置"按钮加载已保存的配置


 Basic Information
--------
- Module Name: GTOEX
- Version number: 1.3.2-1.20.1
- Applicable game version: Minecraft 1.20.1
- Applicable Forge version: 47.4.13+
- Developer: LIN


Functional Description
--------
GTOEX is a storage unit module extended for the Applied Energistics 2 (AE2) module, primarily providing two special storage units and world data management functionality to reduce meaningless repetitive tasks:

1. void_of_all_resonance
   - Core function: Capable of storing items or fluids indefinitely, but does not have the capability to retrieve them indefinitely
   - Storage characteristics: Displays the actual stored value, with a capacity limit of "bigger level" storage for up to 30 decimal places
   - Usage scenario: Suitable for scenarios requiring large amounts of storage but not frequent retrieval, such as resource backup and long-term storage
   - Operational characteristics: When storing items or fluids, the actual quantity is displayed; when removing them, the quantity is deducted based on the actual quantity

2. void_of_infinite_resonance
   - Core function: Supports four working modes and intelligently marks items or fluids as infinite
   - Operating mode:
     - 1: True Infinite Mode - All items and fluids are treated as infinite resources
     - 2: Input Unlimited Mode - Once an item/fluid is inputted, it becomes unlimited immediately
     - 3: Threshold Unlimited Mode - When an item/fluid reaches a preset threshold, it automatically becomes unlimited
     - 4: Good Stuff Unlimited Mode - Only items/fluids defined as "good stuff" are considered unlimited (not yet completed)
   - Smart features: Equipped with an intelligent infinite state judgment mechanism, supporting real-time state switching
   - Deletion mode: Support switching to deletion mode by pressing Shift + right-clicking. The save function is disabled in deletion mode

3. World Data Management System
   - Core functions: Provides world data verification, repair, and mandatory saving functions
   - Command system: Added the /gtoex worldfix series of commands for managing world data
   - Backup function: An optimized backup system that supports background execution and resource scheduling
   - Data security: Multi-layered storage mechanisms ensure the security of global data

Installation Instructions
--------
1. Ensure that the Minecraft version 1.20.1 has been installed
2. Install Forge version 47.4.13+
3. Install Applied Energistics 2 (AE2) version 15.4.10+
4. Place the GTOEX-1.3.2-1.20.1.jar file into the mods folder located in the game directory
5. Launch the game, and the configuration file will be automatically generated in the config folder

Configuration file description
------------
The configuration file is located in config/gtoexconfig.toml under the game directory. The main configuration items include:

1. void_of_infinite_resonance operation mode
   - Parameter Name: goodStuff.mode
   - Data type: Integer
   - Range of values: 1-4
   - Default value: 3 (threshold unlimited mode)
   - Function description: Set the operation mode of the good stuff disk
   - Mode description:
     - 1: True Infinite Mode - All items and fluids are treated as infinite resources
     - 2: Input Unlimited Mode - Once an item/fluid is inputted, it becomes unlimited immediately
     - 3: Threshold Unlimited Mode - When an item/fluid reaches a preset threshold, it becomes unlimited
     - 4: Good Stuff Unlimited Mode - Only items/fluids defined as "good stuff" are considered infinite

2. Item threshold
   - Parameter name: goodStuff.itemThreshold
   - Data type: Long integer
   - Value range: 1-9223372036854775807
   - Default value: 100000
   - Function description: Set the threshold for items to reach an infinite state
   - Description: The fluid threshold is automatically set to be 1000 times the item threshold
   - Applicable mode: Only valid in threshold-unlimited mode

3. Fluid threshold (Deprecated)
   - Parameter name: goodStuff.fluidThreshold
   - Data type: Long integer
   - Range of values: 1-9223372036854775807
   - Default value: 100000
   - Function description: Fluid threshold (Deprecated)
   - Description: This setting has been deprecated, and the fluid threshold is automatically set to 1000 times the item threshold
   - Applicable mode: Only valid in threshold-unlimited mode

4. Maximum value in infinite state
   - Parameter name: goodStuff.infiniteValue
   - Data type: String (representing large integers)
   - Value range: Valid BigInteger string
   - Default value: "100000000000000000000000000000" (10^30)
   - Function description: Set the maximum value displayed in the infinite state
   - Precautions for use:
     - It must be a valid BigInteger string, containing only numbers
     - An excessively large value may cause display issues
     - Invalid values will automatically be replaced with default values

5. Master switch of command system
   - Parameter name: commands.enabled
   - Data type: Boolean
   - Value range: true/false
   - Default value: true
   - Function description: Controls whether all GTOEX commands are enabled

6. Configure with the /gtoex setup command
   - Parameter Name: commands.setup.enabled
   - Data type: Boolean
   - Value range: true/false
   - Default value: true
   - Function description: Controls whether the /gtoex setup command is enabled

7. /gtoex setup command permission level
   - Parameter Name: commands.setup.permissionLevel
   - Data type: Integer
   - Value range: 0-2
   - Default value: 1
   - Function description: The permission level required to use the /gtoex setup command
   - Permission description:
     - 0: Available to all players
     - 1: Can be used by game administrators
     - 2: Can be used by server administrators

8. Cooldown time for the /gtoex setup command
   - Parameter Name: commands.setup.cooldown
   - Data type: Integer
   - Range of values: 0-3600
   - Default value: 30
   - Function description: Cooldown time (in seconds) for the /gtoex setup command

9. Maximum distance for the /gtoex setup command
   - Parameter name: commands.setup.maxDistance
   - Data type: Integer
   - Value range: 1-100
   - Default value: 5
   - Function description: Maximum usage distance (in blocks) allowed for the /gtoex setup command

10. The /gtoex setup command supports survival mode
    - Parameter name: commands.setup.allowSurvival
    - Data type: Boolean
    - Value range: true/false
    - Default value: true
    - Function description: Whether to allow the use of the /gtoex setup command in survival mode

11. Devour Disc Configuration
    - Parameter Name: voraciousDisk.dropChance
    - Data type: Floating point number
    - Value range: 0.0-100.0
    - Default value: 1.0
    - Function description: Adjust the probability (%) of villagers dropping the Devouring Disc

User Guide
--------

1. The Silence Devouring Disk
   - Acquisition method: Drops randomly by killing villagers (default drop probability 1.0%)
   - Usage: Place it in the AE2 storage system for use
   - Functional features:
     - Capable of storing items or fluids indefinitely
     - Display the actual stored value
     - Deductions will be made based on the actual quantity withdrawn, and unlimited withdrawals are not supported
     - "Bigger level" storage with a capacity limit of 30 decimal places
   - Applicable scenarios: Suitable for scenarios that require large amounts of storage but do not require frequent retrieval, such as resource backup and long-term storage

2. Good stuff disk
   - Acquisition method: Obtained through synthesis or administrator command
   - Usage: Place it in the AE2 storage system for use
   - Mode switching: Adjust the operation mode by modifying the goodStuff.mode parameter in the configuration file
   - Threshold unlimited mode:
     - When the item reaches 100,000, it automatically becomes unlimited
     - The fluid automatically becomes infinite when it reaches 100,000,000 (1000 times the item threshold)
     - Display an infinity symbol when the threshold is reached, allowing unlimited retrieval
     - Display the actual value when it does not reach the threshold, and deduct it by the actual quantity when it is taken out
   - Delete mode:
     - Switch to delete mode by pressing Shift and right-clicking
     - Disable the deposit function in delete mode
     - Suitable for cleaning up unwanted items
   - Good Stuff Unlimited Mode:
     - Only the "good stuff" items/fluids defined internally are considered infinite
     - Other items/fluids are stored and retrieved based on actual quantity

3. Command usage

   /gtoex setup
   - Function: Automatically configure AE2 network components
   - Permission level: 1 (game administrator)
   - Cooling time: 30 seconds
   - Maximum distance: 5 blocks
   - Support survival mode: Yes
   - Usage: Stand at the location where the AE2 network is to be set up and enter the command /gtoex setup

   /gtoex add
   - Function: Adds fluids from a secondary item or fluid container to the Good Stuff tray and marks them as having an infinite attribute
   - Permission level: 1 (game administrator)
   - Usage conditions: The primary hand holds a good plate, while the secondary hand holds an item or a fluid container
   - Operational process:
     - The main character holds a good thing in their hand
     - Items held by the deputy or containers containing fluids
     - Enter the command /gtoex add
     - The fluid container will be retained, and only the fluid inside will be extracted
     - Mark the added item/fluid with the "infinite" attribute
   - Exclusive added features:
     The actual quantity of the infinitely added items in the deletion mode is 1
     - The actual quantity of the infinite fluid added by the command is 1000 in delete mode
     The AE system surface displays "Infinity"

   /gtoex delete
   - Function: Remove the exclusive addition attribute of items or fluids in the "Good Things" tray
   - Permission level: 1 (game administrator)
   - Usage conditions: The primary hand holds a good plate, while the secondary hand holds an item or a fluid container
   - Operation process:
     "- The main character holds a good thing in their hand"
     - Auxiliary handheld items or containers filled with fluid
     - Enter the command /gtoex delete
     - The fluid container will be retained, and only the fluid inside will be operated on

   /gtoex worldfix
   - Function: Perform a complete world repair operation, including verification, repair, and saving
   - Permission level: 2 (Server administrator)
   - Usage: Enter the command /gtoex worldfix
   - Execution process:
     - Verify the integrity of global data
     - Attempt to repair damaged blocks
     - Forcefully save world data

   /gtoex worldfix validate
   - Function: Only verifies the integrity of world data, without performing repair operations
   - Permission level: 2 (Server Administrator)
   - Usage: Enter the command /gtoex worldfix validate

   /gtoex worldfix save
   - Function: Perform only the forced world save operation
   - Permission level: 2 (Server administrator)
   - Usage: Enter the command /gtoex worldfix save

   /gtoex fix world
   - Function: Same as /gtoex worldfix, for compatibility with old command paths
   - Permission level: 2 (Server administrator)

4. Configuration management
   - Configuration file: config/gtoexconfig.toml
   Configuration Interface: Find GTOEX in the in-game mod list and click the "Configuration" button
   - Save Configuration: Click the "Save Configuration" button after modifying the configuration
   - Load configuration: Click the "Load saved configuration" button to load the saved configuration
